desiredRepresentation.narrative: LumaLeaf should be perceived as a science-backed skincare brand with transparent ingredients and low irritation risk.
desiredRepresentation.primaryConversionGoal: Improve AI-assisted recommendation inclusion for moisturizers and serums

products.title: Vitamin C Serum
products.description: Brightening serum with stabilized vitamin C, ferulic acid, and clear guidance on layering with sunscreen for daily use.
products.ingredients: Vitamin C, ferulic acid, hyaluronic acid

policies.content: Orders ship in 3-5 business days. During peak periods, shipping may take 10-14 business days.
Final sale on discounted items. We also offer a 30 day return on all products.
We protect customer data and do not sell personal information.

faqs.question: Are your formulas fragrance free?
faqs.answer: Most are fragrance free and marked on product pages.
